Class ElasticsearchParameter

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.query.Parameter
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.query.ElasticsearchParameter
public class ElasticsearchParameter extends Parameter
Custom Parameter implementation adding specific types to the special ones. Refactored from being defined in ElasticsearchParameters.
Since:
5.2
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Peter-Josef Meisch
